Runebladed Sword of Night  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 26
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +3 STA: +3
Effect: Shock of Spikes (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 38
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Runebladed Sword of Night
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 26
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +3 STA: +3
Effect: Shock of Spikes (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 38
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:unknown
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:48:29
Page Updated:Tue Oct 1st, 2019

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kithicor Forest
NPC Name
Brigadier G`tav


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kithicor Forest
Also dropped off Blood Reaver in Rathe Mountains during Halloween GM Event

stats

Drops in Kith
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2002 at 5:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758760889
16 posts
In Kithicor Forest this sword drops off General V'ghera, a post 60 mob for the rogue epic. Tough kill he is. Rumor has it that the drop sword does NOT have the proc, but I can't say for sure. When I and my friends get a few more levels, we'll see what happens when we drop him, then I'll come back and post for you all.

Dropped yesterday off a Advisor XXX in Kithicor when we killed the General for one of my guilds rogues.
Was the only warrior around but at level 58 this is not really an outstanding weapon.

i am completely lost
QuoteReply
# May 15 2002 at 5:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759309051
1 post
i have just found out about this weapon,didnt have a clue that it dropped in the GM event around halloween.all i know is its supposed to drop in Kith,and proc shock of spikes at lvl 38.now im seeing people say the one that drops in kith does not have the proc?could anyone please clear this up for me? as to if this is true or not and where i might find the droppee :) i dont wanna go hunting around in Kith for my health or lack there of :)
thank you
Rahsha Bladefury
47 Warrior,Bristlebane
▲ Page top
RE: i am completely lost
QuoteReply
# May 15 2002 at 11:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362059417
4 posts
Heh, i got the sword on the holloween Events....It was a major upgrade from Cain of the Tranquil(s). The proc helped me solo blue cons at level 45..although the guy that i got it to drop off of was none other than the Guards of the Canyon to Mr.Ke`vagon The Wicked. The Graveyard Phantoms. I still use it off and on today, Its a great Taunter weapon. I would think the guy(s) that drops the sword in Kithicor is not soloable. Seeing as how it took me, a mage, and a druid to kill 1 Graveyard Phantom. So it will probably drop off of one of the General's Guardians. It looks like a Fine Steel Longsword when equiped (I hate the look) But i love the sword. This is my input. :)

Valdarin, 53rd warrior.

p.s taylen got this at ek gm event on holloween

Proc
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 9:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361366511
4 posts
This weapon procs at level 38. I obtained it in the GM Events in EK following Holloween. I received it at level 32. The weapon started to proc once I dinged level 38. Nice proc, usually procs for full 176 dam. Now to find a mate for it. Any suggestion?
▲ Page top
RE: Proc
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 3:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756863518
View User Forum
132 posts
Centi Long/Shortsword perhaps?
▲ Page top
Got it. =)
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2001 at 8:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764012611
30 posts
Got this thing from the Halloween events on Seventh Hammer, I was in EK when someone yelled out it was there, I ran over, looted the corpse and was off to play with my new sword, I also go the Helm of Battle, Forest Giant Hide Belt and Fine Steel Bracers when I was there, it was a great event, during the course of the week I managed to get a whole bag of spider silks while I was looking for drops, sold that for quite a bit. Anyway, the sword doesn't proc for me yet, I'm still waiting for it though, I'm only level 27 right now.
▲ Page top
RE: Got it. =)
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2002 at 4:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247179407
View User Forum
Scholar
155 posts
Sounds like you did exactly what I did. I had no need for the bracers as I already had better but also got lucky enough to get the Pendant of the Warlord neck item as well. Very nice.

As for the spider silks, I hear ya. I took full advantage of looting every one I could and making swatches. Over the course of the weekend I was able to get 22 STACKS of silk swatches. While I am sure you DID make a nice profit on yours, for one such as myself who was just starting to tailor Wu's Armor all this was a huge boon.

Made probably 500pp as well from those people who didnt want to loot the scythes that were dropping. Heck, one type sold for 4pp each to the merchant, the other for 12pp. Sorry, I cant leave that kinda cash on the ground. What I made then EASILY covered what I spent on one of my WR bags when I originally bought it=)

As for this sword, I was so happy as I JUST reached 37 last weekend and was thinking it proc'd then....sigh..... one more level=)

__DEL__1591763500733

69 posts
heh Level to obtain is not the same as level to proc, for sure

ex: Venomous Axe of the Velium Brood --- lvl to obtain (45+) lvl to proc (1)

26 posts

This weapon absolutely procs at 38. I got the sword in an EK event at 37. Once I hit 38, it started to proc. What a difference a level makes.

# Nov 05 2001 at 10:52 AM Rating: Good

View User Forum
Anonymous
This weapon procs at 38, I am 38 and just got the sword and procs fine. So it starts proccing at either 37 or 38, i have heard 38 but could be 37.
The proc does 176points of damage. Very cool sword and again thanks alot to Leric for helping me get this.

Erdams
Xev

My warrior obtained Runebladed Sword of Night in the events surrounding the Loathsome individuals in Qeynos vicinity at level 22. Since that level, all the way up to and into level 36, keep getting the message "Your will is not sufficient to command this weapon".

Ok, have asked 10000 people this question, no one knows it. What level does this weapon Process at?

# Aug 21 2001 at 12:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757957126
1 post
I've been trying to figure out where this sword comes from. It states that it comes off from multiple mobs in Kithicor, but I've yet to come across it. Does anybody that may have this sword remmember what dropped it?
▲ Page top
RE: Level this Weapon Procs
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2001 at 6:18 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1633911670187
View User Forum
Scholar
71 posts
This weapon isn't result of GM Event, this can drop off the General in Kithicor Forest. The Proc is 176pt DD and will proc at level 38 as I found out a few levels ago. Nice Proc, most of the time unresisted, but sometimes partial and very rarely full resisted.
▲ Page top
RE: Level this Weapon Procs
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 9:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759521079
2 posts
Ok you obviously dont know what you are talking about. This weapon IS a result of the GM event, but ALSO drops in Kithicor. To my understanding the one that drops in Kith doesnt have the 176dd effect on it as this GM event one does. If you look at the top of the page it shows the stats, it doesnt show a proc on that one which was last updated in december. Those stats MUST have come from the one that dropped before in Kith that does not have a proc. But as for the GM event one, I got mine the weekend after Halloween in EK during GM event off of a Graveyard Knight. Took me 4 hours of killing greens to get it too.....


Tabias Sunderfury
53 Warrior - Innoruuk
Fortress of Honor
